invariants_acknowledged: Hexagonal architecture: UI → API → Domain layer order
RoutingRule, RoutingAudit, AgentAvailability have no tenantId field
RoutingAudit uses flat fields (ruleId, ruleName, toUserId, toUserName) not relations
All Prisma Json fields cast as any for type compatibility

validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm vitest run (19 API + 45 web routing tests)

validation_results.name: Build
validation_results.command: pnpm typecheck (full monorepo, 0 new errors from PG-132)

definition_of_done_items.evidence: RoutingRulesEditor.tsx with DnD sortable, routing.router.ts with list/get/create/update/delete/reorder/toggle endpoints

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Assignment dashboard with stats and recent assignments table
definition_of_done_items.evidence: AssignmentDashboard.tsx with 4 stats cards (Assigned Today, Avg Assignment Time, Active Rules, Unassigned Leads) and recent assignments table
SLAMonitor.tsx with circular progress bars, SLA rules display, and performance metrics

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Lead queue view with filtering and manual assignment
definition_of_done_items.evidence: LeadQueueView.tsx with score/source filtering, lead table, and assignLead mutation via routing.router.ts

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Agent workload view with capacity tracking
definition_of_done_items.evidence: AgentWorkload.tsx with capacity bars, skills display, status indicators, and getAgentWorkload endpoint

definition_of_done_items.criterion: tRPC routing router with all endpoints
definition_of_done_items.evidence: routing.router.ts: list, get, create, update, delete, reorder, toggle, getAssignments, getAgentWorkload, getLeadQueue, assignLead
apps/web/src/app/settings/routing/hooks/useRouting.ts with full CRUD mutations and queries

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Tests for all components and router
definition_of_done_items.evidence: 64 tests total: routing.router.test.ts (19), RoutingRulesEditor.test.tsx (8), AssignmentDashboard.test.tsx (5), SLAMonitor.test.tsx, LeadQueueView.test.tsx, AgentWorkload.test.tsx, useRouting.test.ts, page.test.tsx

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Accessibility: ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation, aria-live regions
definition_of_done_items.evidence: role=listbox on draggable list, role=switch on toggles, aria-live=polite on stats, aria-labels on delete buttons

notes: PG-132 Smart Lead Routing UI — full implementation with 5 UI components, tRPC router (11 endpoints), validators, useRouting hook, and 64 passing tests. Key fix: routing.router.ts was rewritten to align with actual Prisma schema (RoutingRule/RoutingAudit/AgentAvailability have no tenantId, RoutingAudit uses flat fields not relations). MATOP: Foundation PASS, Quality PASS.
